_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Performance Specification Documents
summary: This Data Item Description specifies functional requirements for items in various programs, focusing on required results, operating environment, interface characteristics, and verification criteria, intended for acquisition contracts.
use_relationship:
A performance specification will be used to specify functional requirements for items used in multiple programs or applications, in terms of required results, the environment in which it must operate, interface and interchange characteristics, and the criteria for verifying compliance. Performance specification documents are intended for reference in acquisition contracts.

This Data Item Description contains the content and format preparation instructions for performance specifications and their associated documents that are described in the following paragraphs of MIL-STD-961E. Only those documents listed below will be required when specified individually on contract.

a. Performance Specification – Paragraphs 4.1 through 5.14.
b. Performance Specification Sheet – Paragraphs 5.16 through 5.16.4.
c. Performance Specification Revision – Paragraphs 5.17 through 5.17.2.
d. Performance Specification Supplement – Paragraphs 5.15 through 5.15.9.
e. Performance Specification Amendment – Paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.
f. Performance Specification Inactive for New Design Notice – Paragraph 5.19.2.
g. Performance Specification Cancellation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.3.
h. Performance Specification Reinstatement Notice – Paragraph 5.19.4.
i. Performance Specification Reactivation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.5.
j. Performance Specification Administrative Notice – Paragraph 5.19.6.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and content.
preparation_instructions.content: Format and content for Performance specification documents shall be as follows:

children.title: Performance Specification.
children.content: Format and content of performance specification shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.14.

children.title: Performance Specification Sheet.
children.content: Format and content of performance specification sheets shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.16 through 5.16.4.

children.title: Performance Specification Revision.
children.content: Format and content of performance specification revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.17 through 5.17.2.

children.title: Performance Specification Supplement.
children.content: Format and content of performance specification supplements shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.15 through 5.15.9.

children.title: Performance Specification Amendment.
children.content: Format and content of performance specification amendments shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.

children.title: Performance Specification Inactive for New Design Notice.
children.content: Format and content of inactive for new design notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.2.

children.title: Performance Specification Cancellation Notice.
children.content: Format and content of cancellation notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.3.

children.title: Performance Specification Reinstatement Notice.
children.content: Format and content of reinstatement notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.4.

children.title: Performance Specification Reactivation Notice.
children.content: Format and content of reactivation notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.5.

children.title: Performance Specification Administrative Notice.
children.content: Format and content of administrative notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.6.
